Event: Tavern of Fortune - July 2026
Event Date: 08/07/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: W53
Magic Arbiter Scepter

For the duration of the battle, the unit's spell power is increased by 10% for each unit that is petrified (or turned into a rock) on the battlefield. Stacks up to 16 times.

Once in a while, the unit turns 2 random enemy units into rocks for 4 sec. and deals magic damage equal to 75% of own spell power to the targets. For 4 sec., the targets are unable to move, and take 40% more damage. The targets also receive 300000 magic damage every second for the duration. When the effect wears off, the targets explode. The explosion deals 400000 pure damage to the targets; their physical and magic armor are reduced by 35% for 4 sec. Rocks are also launched at 2 nearest enemy units. The rocks deal 350000 physical damage on impact and stun the targets for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
